questionHtml:
Which technique is used to detect the isotopes of an element?

A.  Mass spectrometry

B.  Infrared spectroscopy

C.  Titration

D.  Recrystallization

meta.title: Which technique is used to detect the isotopes of an element? A. Mass spectrometry B. Infrared spectroscopy C. Titration D. Recrystallization
breadcrumbLabels: Structure 1. Models of the particulate nature of matter

Structure 1.2.2—Isotopes. Isotopes are atoms of the same element with different numbers of neutrons. Perform calculations involving non-integer relative atomic masses and abundance of isotopes from given data.
